ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brand_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the metric entry */,
  "spontaneous_brand_awareness" INTEGER /* Percentage of spontaneous brand awareness */,
  "brand_consideration" INTEGER /* Percentage of brand consideration */,
  "fibre_awareness" INTEGER /* Percentage of fibre awareness (prompted) */,
  "fibre_consideration" INTEGER /* Percentage of fibre consideration */,
  "tv_awareness" INTEGER /* Percentage of TV awareness (prompted) */,
  "tv_consideration" INTEGER /* Percentage of TV consideration */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand category */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific product */,
  "source_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source media channel */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_metrics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES brand_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_metrics_source_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_metrics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary media channel used */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "campaign_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the media channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., TV, Social Media, Print) */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Estimated reach of the channel */,
  "cost_per_impression" REAL /* Cost per thousand impressions (CPM) */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumers" (
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the consumer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the consumer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the consumer */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level category of the consumer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the consumer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the consumer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the consumer */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Consumer interests */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Loyalty status of the consumer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer providing the response */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand metric associated with the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Detailed response text or notes */,
  "response_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score for the response */,
  "response_source" TEXT /* Source of the response (e.g., Online, Phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Marketing Manager, Analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign linked to the performance */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand metric linked to the performance */,
  "overall_awareness" INTEGER /* Overall brand awareness percentage */,
  "overall_consideration" INTEGER /* Overall brand consideration percentage */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand category */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific product */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_performance_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES brand_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_performance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES brand_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awareness_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand metric linked to the trend */,
  "change_in_awareness" REAL /* Change in awareness percentage compared to previous month */,
  "change_in_consideration" REAL /* Change in consideration percentage compared to previous month */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand category */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific product */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awareness_trends_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awareness_trends_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES brand_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awareness_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awareness_trends_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES brand_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES brand_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel performance record */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media channel used */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign linked to the performance */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand metric linked to the performance */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Reach of the channel during the campaign */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement percentage during the campaign */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand category */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific product */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate for the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_performance_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES brand_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_performance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES brand_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of product launch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
